title: Instagram Profile Scraper - Bio, Followers & Stats
description: Scrape public Instagram profiles: bio, follower/following counts, post count, verification, and business info. Fast and reliable for influencer research, brand monitoring, and lead generation. Optional best-effort post scraping (beta).

usernames.title: Instagram Usernames or Profile URLs
usernames.description: Enter Instagram usernames (without @) or full profile URLs. Multiple entries supported.

maxPostsPerProfile.title: Max Posts Per Profile (beta)
maxPostsPerProfile.description: Number of recent posts to scrape per profile. Profile data is always scraped reliably; post scraping is best-effort and may be limited by Instagram's logged-out restrictions. Leave at 0 for fast, reliable profile-only scraping.

includeReels.title: Include Reels
includeReels.description: Whether to include Instagram Reels in the scraped posts.

includeCarousels.title: Include Carousels
includeCarousels.description: Whether to include carousel (multi-image/video) posts in the scraped posts.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Configure proxies for scraping. Residential proxies recommended for Instagram.
